title: Research notes
text: Source 1 (Nature, 2024): The fastest typing speed recorded is 216 WPM, set in 1946 on a manual typewriter. Source 2 (Guinness): Modern computer-typing record is 248 WPM. Both rely on extensive muscle-memory training over years.

tips.target: Source 1 (Nature, 2024): The fastest typing speed recorded is 216 WPM, set in 1946 on a manual
typewriter. Source 2 (Guinness): Modern computer-typing record is 248 WPM. Both rely on extensive muscle-memory training over years.

character_tips.maxim: If you can type research at 93 WPM, papers fly by.
